name: Gemini semantic extraction for docs
command:
cd /Users/ashebanow/Development/ai/raindrop-skills && $(cat graphify-out/.graphify_python) -c "
import json
from graphify.llm import extract_corpus_parallel
from pathlib import Path

detect = json.loads(Path('graphify-out/.graphify_detect.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
doc_files = [f for cat in ('document', 'paper', 'image') for f in detect['files'].get(cat, [])]

if doc_files:
    result = extract_corpus_parallel(doc_files, backend='gemini')
    Path('graphify-out/.graphify_semantic.json').write_text(json.dumps(result, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False), encoding='utf-8')
    print(f'Semantic: {len(result[\"nodes\"])} nodes, {len(result[\"edges\"])} edges')
    print(f'Tokens: {result.get(\"input_tokens\", 0):,} in / {result.get(\"output_tokens\", 0):,} out')
else:
    Path('graphify-out/.graphify_semantic.json').write_text(json.dumps({'nodes':[],'edges':[],'hyperedges':[],'input_tokens':0,'output_tokens':0}, ensure_ascii=False), encoding='utf-8')
    print('No docs - skipping semantic extraction')
"
